retrieved_result: Safe Drinking Water Branch Rainwater Catchment How to make a home rainwater catchment system safe for domestic use Rainwater catchment systems on individual homes are not regulated by the Department of Health (DOH). Home owners that intend to use rainwater collected off their home’s roof can take action to help make the water
